ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the project was last updated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the project */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team associated with the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "config_files" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration file */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the configuration file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the configuration file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the configuration file was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the configuration file was last updated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the configuration file */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment for which the configuration file is intended */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the configuration file for integrity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_files_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "config_variables" (
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration variable */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration file the variable is extracted from */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration variable */,
  "variable_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration variable */,
  "start_line" INTEGER /* Start line number of the variable in the configuration file */,
  "start_character" INTEGER /* Start character position of the variable in the configuration file */,
  "end_line" INTEGER /* End line number of the variable in the configuration file */,
  "end_character" INTEGER /* End character position of the variable in the configuration file */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variable type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration variable */,
  "required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the variable is required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_variables_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES config_files ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "builds" (
  "build_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each build */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the build belongs to */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration file used for the build */,
  "build_status" TEXT /* Status of the build (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "build_date" TEXT /* Date the build was performed */,
  "log_file_path" TEXT /* Path to the log file of the build */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment for which the build was performed */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the build in seconds */,
  "trigger" TEXT /* Trigger of the build (e.g., manual, CI/CD pipeline) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("build_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_builds_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES config_files ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_builds_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, build engineer, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions for the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES projects ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project accessed */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration file accessed */,
  "build_id" INTEGER /* ID of the build accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, run build) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_build_id FOREIGN KEY ("build_id") REFERENCES builds ("build_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES config_files ("config_id")
)
